sub_modules.gaussian3x3_sum: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian weighted stencil sum using coefficients 1 2 1 / 2 4 2 / 1 2 1.
sub_modules.gaussian3x3_norm: Combinational normalization of the Gaussian stencil sum by 16.
sub_modules.pixel_difference: Combinational pointwise high-frequency extraction, original minus blurred pixel.
sub_modules.gain_scale: Combinational signed gain multiplication for the high-frequency component.
sub_modules.reconstruct_pixel: Combinational pointwise reconstruction by adding the scaled high-frequency component to the original pixel.
sub_modules.saturate_pixel: Combinational clamp of the reconstructed signed value to the output pixel range.
